svg.text: Ariadne TPS Feature Space — LDA_REFERENCE_SUBCLADE_SPREAD Embedding
Background: reference clades. Foreground: discovered candidates. Sequence labels omitted for visual clarity — see classification.tsv.

LDA_REFERENCE_SUBCLADE_SPREAD embedding computed from HMM-score feature matrix (column-mean normalised, z-scored for display). Candidate IDs omitted from plot; see classification.tsv for per-sequence assignments.
